Title: Book with equipment add-on - price and availability correct
Notes: Browser automation flaked on the slot-picker page for this session -- not exercised manually. Server-side pricing logic (computeTotal + equipment_total) covered by createBooking.test.ts.

Title: Concurrent booking requests for last unit of equipment (race)
Notes: Ran src/lib/__tests__/equipmentReserve.integration.test.ts against live DB 2026-07-21. Found the original test's precondition (two bookings with identical overlapping windows) is structurally impossible in this single-room schema -- bookings_no_overlap rejects the second insert (23P01) before any equipment RPC race could occur. Rewrote the test to assert this directly; now passes. See the test file's updated header comment for full analysis. Not a regression in plan 016's fix -- the RPC layer is correct but currently unreachable/redundant given room-level exclusivity.
